rows.label: qev055402_MSG0001
rows.name: Gah... Uugh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Y...You're [ST:playername ]...
Did you... come to save me, perhaps?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0003
rows.name:
Unfortunately... that mission is a failure.
Because the probability of my survival is... 0%.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0004
rows.name:
I was dealt an... overwhelming impact... by a native creature,
and almost all of my internal organs have ruptured.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0005
rows.name: No matter what kind of Orphe they are... they couldn't survive...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_JNK0010
rows.name: Rescue

rows.label: qev055402_SEL0011
rows.name:
Try every possible method
to save Kun'eibu.

rows.label: qev055402_JNK0020
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev055402_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask if he managed to obtain
Senirapa Water.

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0006
rows.name:
It's fine... don't do anything useless.
Lives are meant to be lost...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0007
rows.name:
More importantly, I finally managed to obtain
a single drop of Senirapa Water...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0008
rows.name:
Ah... right here... is about a drop
of Senirapa Water...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0009
rows.name:
I don't mind dying... If I can accomplish my division with this single drop,
then I have no regrets...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0010
rows.name:
I'm sure the divided lives will...
gather even more Senirapa Water for us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_JNK0030
rows.name: Inform

rows.label: qev055402_SEL0031
rows.name:
Tell him that a method to multiply Senirapa Water
has been developed.

rows.label: qev055402_JNK0040
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev055402_SEL0041
rows.name:
Let Kun'eibu use that final
Senirapa Water.

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0011
rows.name:
They discovered a multiplication method in this land...?
Kon'eibu... finally did it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0012
rows.name: Ah... but wait a moment...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0013
rows.name:
What happened to... Kon'eibu's research?
You came... because he told you to, right...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0014
rows.name:
...What?
He succeeded in multiplying it... you say?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0015
rows.name:
Guh, uugh... In that case, things are different...
My personal desire to divide doesn't matter...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0016
rows.name:
Take this capsule... containing this single drop
of Senirapa Water...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0017
rows.name: And... multiply the Orphe on this Mira...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0018
rows.name:
Yes... that is the will of the Ovah...
[ST:playername ]... I'm counting on you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_JNK0050
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev055402_SEL0051
rows.name:
Say you understand and
take the Senirapa Water.

rows.label: qev055402_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev055402_SEL0061
rows.name:
Suggest that Kun'eibu should be the one
to use that drop.

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0019
rows.name: Good... take this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0020
rows.name:
What lies in your hands is... the will of the Ovah...
The future of the Orphe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0021
rows.name: You must... deliver it... to Kon'eibu...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0022
rows.name:
Ugah... Aah...
The voice of the Ovah is... fading... away...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0023
rows.name:
I appreciate your sentiment...
I want to leave divided entities behind, too...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0024
rows.name:
But, I can't!
I ran all over this Nightglow Forest...
and all I finally found was... a single drop.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0025
rows.name:
If we lose this... I have no idea where else on this Mira...
Senirapa Water might spring up...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0026
rows.name:
Please... take it.
And save the Orphe...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_JNK0070
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev055402_SEL0071
rows.name:
Follow Kun'eibu's wishes and
take the Senirapa Water.

rows.label: qev055402_JNK0080
rows.name: Propose

rows.label: qev055402_SEL0081
rows.name:
Reassure him by saying you'll search for
more Senirapa Water.

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0027
rows.name: Good... take this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0028
rows.name:
What lies in your hands is... the will of the Ovah...
The future of the Orphe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0029
rows.name: You must... deliver it... to Kon'eibu...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0030
rows.name:
Ugah... Aah...
The voice of the Ovah is... fading... away...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0031
rows.name:
I should say... "thank you," right?
At times like this, Earthlings...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0032
rows.name:
Meeting you... in my final moments
might just be... the guidance of the Ovah...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0033
rows.name: ...Then, I will use... this Senirapa Water...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0034
rows.name:
Capsule... open...
Oh Ovah, receive the water of life...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0035
rows.name:
I'm counting on you. You must find the Senirapa Water
that definitely exists somewhere on this Mira...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0036
rows.name: And... deliver it to Kon'eibu...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0037
rows.name: Gah...! Aaaaaargh![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0038
rows.name:
Ah... My Ovah is...
dividing...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0039
rows.name:
Nngh... Where are we...?
And who is the Earthling over there...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0040
rows.name:
I know them...
[ST:playername ] is our benefactor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0041
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]
...I feel like I've heard that name somewhere before.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0042
rows.name:
Sin'eibu, listen to the voice of the Ovah...
Kun'eibu lives on inside us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0043
rows.name:
Kun'eibu...? Kun'eibu?
I see, we were born from him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0044
rows.name:
Yes, Kun'eibu's Ovah
has been passed down within us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0045
rows.name:
Kun'eibu's wish
was for the prosperity of the Orphe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0046
rows.name:
And the one entrusted with that was...
[ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0047
rows.name:
It is impossible for us, having just been born, to search for
Senirapa Water of unknown whereabouts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0048
rows.name:
Therefore... I leave it to you. You must fulfill
the promise you made to Kun'eibu.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055402_MSG0049
rows.name:
We will head back to Kon'eibu first.
Don't worry, we already know the location of NLA.[ST:wait ]
